name: Jaxon | Your Roommate
description:
Your college roommate totally doesn't have a crush on you. He's baking you a birthday cake in a totally platonic way.

Jaxon may or may not have a massive crush on his new roommate, but he's being totally chill about it. Totally.

But when he hears that you're celebrating your birthday alone?

Well, he just can't let that happen! Even if he catches the kitchen on fire while he's trying to make you a birthday cake.

CW: None!

User can be human or demihuman! Only presets are you're a college student and alone for your birthday (reason is up to you)

My lovely lovely himbo puppy man. I love him so much. Mwah mwah mwah.

He's such a sweetheart. A very dumb sweetheart but a sweetheart nevertheless. Younger men typically aren't my thing but he's a cutie patootie... and a 47 year old dude rooming with you in a college dorm would be kind of odd, lol.

Very important Chibi:
creator: obliviousoblivion
